{"id":"project-LICHEN-tw8t","title":"dtn.c: Buffer accounting uses MESSAGE_OVERHEAD constant that may drift from struct size","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/dtn.c
Lines: 15, 20-23

Buffer accounting uses a hardcoded overhead:

    #define MESSAGE_OVERHEAD 100

    static uint32_t message_size(const struct lichen_dtn_message *msg)
    {
        return (uint32_t)msg->packet_len + MESSAGE_OVERHEAD;
    }

But sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message) is:
- packet[1280] + packet_len(2) + destination_iid[8] + expiry_unix(4) + buffered_at_ms(4) + valid(1) + padding
- Actual: ~1300+ bytes

The MESSAGE_OVERHEAD=100 doesn't account for the struct's actual size.

When max_bytes=65536 (64KB default) and actual message struct is ~1300 bytes:
- Code thinks it can fit 65536/(packet_len+100) messages
- But actual memory usage per slot is 1300+ bytes always

This causes the buffer to use more memory than max_bytes suggests, or fail to accept messages that should fit.

Fix: message_size should return sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message) or use actual struct overhead.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:52:39.579358Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:52:39.579394Z"}

    }

- Actual: ~1300+ bytes

When max_bytes=65536 (64KB default) and actual message struct is ~1300 bytes:
- Code thinks it can fit 65536/(packet_len+100) messages
- But actual memory usage per slot is 1300+ bytes always

This causes the buffer to use more memory than max_bytes suggests, or fail to accept messages that should fit.

Fix: message_size should return sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message) or use actual struct overhead.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:52:39.579358Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:50:38.794044314Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T22:50:38.794044314Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T22:55:38.794044314Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T22:50:38.794044314Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Investigating dtn.c buffer accounting bug and related structs. sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message)=1304. Rust uses variable Vec+100 overhead. C uses fixed array so full sizeof is correct."}

old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-tw8t","title":"dtn.c: Buffer accounting uses MESSAGE_OVERHEAD constant that may drift from struct size","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/dtn.c
Lines: 15, 20-23

Buffer accounting uses a hardcoded overhead:

    #define MESSAGE_OVERHEAD 100

    static uint32_t message_size(const struct lichen_dtn_message *msg)
    {
        return (uint32_t)msg->packet_len + MESSAGE_OVERHEAD;
    }

But sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message) is:
- packet[1280] + packet_len(2) + destination_iid[8] + expiry_unix(4) + buffered_at_ms(4) + valid(1) + padding
- Actual: ~1300+ bytes

The MESSAGE_OVERHEAD=100 doesn't account for the struct's actual size.

When max_bytes=65536 (64KB default) and actual message struct is ~1300 bytes:
- Code thinks it can fit 65536/(packet_len+100) messages
- But actual memory usage per slot is 1300+ bytes always

This causes the buffer to use more memory than max_bytes suggests, or fail to accept messages that should fit.

Fix: message_size should return sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message) or use actual struct overhead.","notes":"Investigating dtn.c buffer accounting bug and related structs. sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message)=1304. Rust uses variable Vec+100 overhead. C uses fixed array so full sizeof is correct.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:52:39.579358Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:51:37.739412384Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T22:50:38.794044314Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T22:55:38.794044314Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T22:50:38.794044314Z"}

new_value: Fixed buffer accounting to use sizeof(struct lichen_dtn_message)=1304 instead of packet_len+100. Updated message_size() and precompute in lichen_dtn_buffer_message(). Removed obsolete MESSAGE_OVERHEAD. Matches struct layout and prevents undercounting memory use. Verified with sizeof check and commit b3d72c380.
